metadata.name: rHDPE-Data-Analysis
metadata.summary: Package for analysing data relating to recycled HDPE

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.TGA_Analysis.Preprocessing.extract_raw_data
documentation: Extract the raw data from the files.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.TGA_Analysis.Preprocessing.add_description_to_file_data
documentation: Add descriptions in the form of letters to each specimen.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.TGA_Analysis.Preprocessing.write_csv
documentation: Write read and preprocessed data to a .csv file.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.TGA_Analysis.Preprocessing.remove_files
documentation: Remove files not needed/wanted for analysis by searching for letters in file descriptions.

documentation: Compute the mean data for each resin.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.TGA_Analysis.Preprocessing.read_mean
documentation: Read the computed means for each resin from a file.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.TGA_Analysis.Deprecated.bound_range
documentation: Creates a mask with which to bound the data.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.TGA_Analysis.Deprecated.bound_temperature
documentation: Bound the data so that it lies within a specified temperature range.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.Global_Utilities.sort_raw_files_1
documentation: Files will have form ResinX, sorting according to X.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.Global_Utilities.sort_raw_files_2
documentation: Files will have form ResinX_Y_, sorting according to Y.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.Global_Utilities.sort_raw_files_3
documentation: Files will have form ResinX_Y_, sorting according to X, then Y.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.Global_Utilities.merge
documentation: Merge resins that are technically the same material.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.Global_Utilities.extract_file_data_from_filenames
documentation: Returns file_data object of form [PCR Sample, PCR Specimen, Plot Label, Description].

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.Global_Utilities.sample_data_from_file_data
documentation: Extract sample data from file data.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.Global_Utilities.sample_mean
documentation: Compute the mean for each sample.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.Global_Utilities.derivative
documentation: Computes the derivative of a set of xy points.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.Global_Utilities.integral_1
documentation: Compute the integral of an xy curve between bounds. This is a true integral, perhaps with a subtraction of a rectangle with height the minimum value.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.Global_Utilities.integral_2
documentation: Compute the integral of an xy curve between bounds. This is the integral if the baseline is the line from the startpoint to the endpoint.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.Global_Utilities.integral_3
documentation: Compute the integral of an xy curve where the data points are at regular intervals (width).

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.Global_Utilities.produce_mask
documentation: Generate a mask to apply given an array to mask and a desired mask.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.Global_Utilities.compute_range_mean_std
documentation: Computes the range, median, mean and standard deviation of a set of curves.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.Global_Utilities.plot_boxes
documentation: Add boxes to a distance matrix around specimens of the same sample.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.Global_Analysis.Utilities.scatterplots

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.FTIR_Analysis.Deprecated.argument_of_maximum_closest_to_wavenumber
documentation: Finds the index of the maximum that is closest to a wavenumber.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.FTIR_Analysis.Deprecated.extract_file_data_from_filenames
documentation: Returns file_data object of form [PCR Sample, PCR Specimen, PCR Label, Description].

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.FTIR_Analysis.Deprecated.read_file
documentation: Read file, extracting x, y values where x varies from 599 to 3997.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.FTIR_Analysis.Deprecated.read_file_tf
documentation: Read file, extracting x, y values where x varies from 599 to 3997.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.FTIR_Analysis.Deprecated.read_files
documentation: Reads the files. y is a list of arrays, an array for each file, x is just a single array.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.FTIR_Analysis.Deprecated.scale_and_shift
documentation: Apply a scale and then a shift to each specimen dependent on how it relates to the mean for that sample.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.FTIR_Analysis.Deprecated.find_index
documentation: Finds the index in the list x that corresponds with the given wavenumber. (Was used for single frequency analysis.)

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.FTIR_Analysis.Deprecated.difference_vectors
documentation: For two arrays of the same length, returns an array where each entry is the difference between the two input arrays at that index.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.FTIR_Analysis.Deprecated.compute_vector_distances
documentation: Turn the difference vectors into simpler results.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.FTIR_Analysis.Deprecated.compute_difference_matrix
documentation: Compute difference matrices for sum and max.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.FTIR_Analysis.Deprecated.sigmoid_filter
documentation: Assigning a sigmoid filter to the magnitude of peaks.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.FTIR_Analysis.Utilities.identify_peaks
documentation:
Identify peaks in the spectrums by considering where the curve of the third derivative
crosses the x-axis with positive gradient as wavenumbers increase,
using the magnitude of the second derivative at this point to determine the significance.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.FTIR_Analysis.Utilities.linear_filter
documentation: Assigning a sigmoid filter to the magnitude of peaks.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.FTIR_Analysis.Utilities.merge_close_peaks
documentation: Peaks whose wavenumbers are within a threshold are merged.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.FTIR_Analysis.Utilities.populate_peaks_array
documentation: Produce a peaks array: where each row is a heat map of where peaks are for a corresponding specturm.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.FTIR_Analysis.Utilities.remove_identical_columns
documentation: Remove identical columns in a peaks array.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.FTIR_Analysis.Utilities.integral_analysis
documentation: Perform an analysis on the data that focuses on integrals.

functions.name: rHDPE_Data_Analysis.FTIR_Analysis.Utilities.normalisation_experimentation
documentation: Experimenting to find best preprocessing for PCA.
